notes: Source: Community Denon AVR research, Home Assistant denonavr integration, ol-iver/denonavr
Port 8080 is the Denon HTTP server; port 60006 is the AIOS/HEOS UPnP server.
These descriptors expose model identity, MAC, serial-like identifiers, API version, pending update metadata, and separate HEOS/AIOS firmware fields.

endpoints.name: Deviceinfo.xml

expected_fields.UpgradeVersion: Pending update metadata; not installed AVR mainboard firmware
expected_fields.SerialNumber: Serial number (may be empty on some firmware)

endpoints.notes: Primary source for Deviceinfo metadata. Do not label UpgradeVersion as installed firmware.

endpoints.name: description.xml
endpoints.notes: Standard UPnP root device description. Used by media renderers.

endpoints.name: aios_device.xml
endpoints.notes: HEOS/AIOS network board UPnP descriptor. May contain HEOS-specific firmware version.
